data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Minimum attendance to run class', which states that if fewer than 8 attendees show up, the class will be rescheduled. However, the evidence indicates that only 5 employees were booked, and attendance records show that Sarah attended 4 out of 5 sessions, while John attended all 5. This means that the minimum attendance requirement of 8 is not met, leading to a gap in satisfying the requirement. The evidence does not provide any indication that the class can proceed with fewer than 8 attendees, which is a critical aspect of the requirement.
gaps: Minimum attendance requirement of 8 not met with only 5 attendees booked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
